_publications._publicationTitle: The haploinsufficient hematopoietic microenvironment is critical to the pathological fracture repair in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: only 15% of PeriCre mice had healed fractures after 28 days...33% of the PeriCre mice withstood the non-unioned fractures at the end of 8-weeks
details: Only 15% had healed fractures after 28 days, with 33% showing non-union at 8 weeks
